detail.name: Modern Editorial (Detail)
detail.description: Best for articles or product details. Uses hero headers and clean typography.

detail.name: Classic Newspaper (Detail)
detail.description: Best for text-heavy content. Uses serif fonts, bylines, and drop-caps.

detail.name: Minimalist Visual (Detail)
detail.description: Best for portfolios. Focuses on large images and whitespace.

list.name: Modern Editorial (List)
list.description: Best for standard news/magazines. Uses bold typography and bento grids.

list.name: Classic Newspaper (List)
list.description: Best for text-heavy content. Uses serif fonts and detailed lists.

list.name: Minimalist Visual (List)
list.description: Best for photography or portfolios. Focuses on whitespace and large images.
